googleModal.title: Google Calendar Integration
googleModal.redirectUriNotSet: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI not set on server — contact admin.
googleModal.noCredentials: No credentials saved yet. Enter Client ID and Secret above.
googleModal.notConfigured: Credentials saved — but redirect URI on server is not configured. Contact admin.
googleModal.requiredFields: Client ID and Client Secret are required.
steps: Go to Google Cloud Console — console.cloud.google.com
Create a new project or select an existing one
Enable Google Calendar API from the API library
Go to Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID
Set application type to Web Application
Copy the redirect URI from the credentials tab and add it to Authorized redirect URIs
Copy Client ID and Secret, then paste them in the credentials tab
Click Save Credentials then click Connect
